title: Assessing the stability of azopolymer nanotopography during live-cell fluorescence imaging.
author: Abdelrahman MH Shen J Fisher NC Losert W Fourkas JT
content:
S-EPMC11347283 PMC11347283 Assessing the stability of azopolymer nanotopography during live-cell fluorescence imaging.

Introduction

Photomodifiable azopolymer nanotopographies represent a powerful means of assessing how cells respond to rapid changes in the local microenvironment. However
